title: Vex Totem
description:
Just a small resourcepack that changes totem of undying to 3D Vex Totem.
UPDATE TO 1.21.1!!!!




No Optifine needed.
body:
# **UPDATED TO 1.21.1!!!**
Just a small resourcepack that changes totem of undying to 3D Vex Totem.

I decided to revisit this resource pack and remade almost everything.

## Changes:

- Better item holding in third person (it doesn't look like you are strangling it anymore :p)
- Better item holding in first person (made it smaller and more off-screen for better view of the game)
- With the replace head slot command, the Vex is going to look like it's floating beside your shoulder.
- Improved Item Frame and Inventory placement
## 

No Optifine needed.
